questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "memory"?
questions.explanation: "memory" có nghĩa là "ký ức".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "recall"?
questions.explanation: "recall" có nghĩa là "nhớ lại".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "freeze"?
questions.explanation: "freeze" có nghĩa là "đóng băng/sững lại".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "crowd"?
questions.explanation: "crowd" có nghĩa là "đám đông".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "storytelling"?
questions.explanation: "storytelling" có nghĩa là "kể chuyện".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "meanwhile"?
questions.explanation: "meanwhile" có nghĩa là "trong khi đó".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "suddenly"?
questions.explanation: "suddenly" có nghĩa là "đột nhiên".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "interrupt"?
questions.explanation: "interrupt" có nghĩa là "làm gián đoạn".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "background"?
questions.explanation: "background" có nghĩa là "bối cảnh".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "describe"?
questions.explanation: "describe" có nghĩa là "miêu tả".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "event"?
questions.explanation: "event" có nghĩa là "sự kiện".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "scene"?
questions.explanation: "scene" có nghĩa là "cảnh".

questions.question: Choose the best word: She cooked dinner; _____, he set the table.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She cooked dinner; meanwhile, he set the table." — từ đúng là "meanwhile" (trong khi đó).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____, the lights went out.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Suddenly, the lights went out." — từ đúng là "suddenly" (đột nhiên).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The phone call _____ed our meeting.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The phone call interrupted our meeting." — từ đúng là "interrupt" (làm gián đoạn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Birds were singing in the _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Birds were singing in the background." — từ đúng là "background" (bối cảnh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Can you _____ what was happening?
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Can you describe what was happening?" — từ đúng là "describe" (miêu tả).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ lasted all evening.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The event lasted all evening." — từ đúng là "event" (sự kiện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She painted the busy street _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She painted the busy street scene." — từ đúng là "scene" (cảnh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The main _____ was very brave.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The main character was very brave." — từ đúng là "character" (nhân vật).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ told the story slowly.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The narrator told the story slowly." — từ đúng là "narrator" (người kể chuyện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ of the film was exciting.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The plot of the film was exciting." — từ đúng là "plot" (cốt truyện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The movie used a _____ to the past.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The movie used a flashback to the past." — từ đúng là "flashback" (hồi tưởng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They were talking _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They were talking simultaneously." — từ đúng là "simultaneously" (đồng thời).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: While I ___ TV, the phone rang.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for an action in progress interrupted by a past simple action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They ___ football when it started to rain.
questions.explanation: Past continuous describes the longer background action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: What ___ you doing at 8 p.m. yesterday?
questions.explanation: Use 'were' with 'you' in past continuous questions.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She was cooking while he ___ the table.
questions.explanation: Two simultaneous past actions both use past continuous.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ not sleeping when you called.
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'I' takes 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: As we ___ home, we saw an accident.
questions.explanation: Past continuous sets the scene for a past simple event.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The sun ___ shining and birds were singing.
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'sun' takes 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They were arguing when I ___ in.
questions.explanation: The short interrupting action uses past simple.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: We ___ dinner when the lights went out.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for the action in progress.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: While the children ___, the parents talked.
questions.explanation: Simultaneous past actions use past continuous.

questions.question: Which English word means "ký ức"?
questions.explanation: "ký ức" trong tiếng Anh là "memory".

questions.question: Which English word means "nhớ lại"?
questions.explanation: "nhớ lại" trong tiếng Anh là "recall".

questions.question: Which English word means "đóng băng/sững lại"?
questions.explanation: "đóng băng/sững lại" trong tiếng Anh là "freeze".

questions.question: Which English word means "đám đông"?
questions.explanation: "đám đông" trong tiếng Anh là "crowd".

questions.question: Which English word means "kể chuyện"?
questions.explanation: "kể chuyện" trong tiếng Anh là "storytelling".

questions.question: Which English word means "trong khi đó"?
questions.explanation: "trong khi đó" trong tiếng Anh là "meanwhile".
